channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, May 19 (game #1576)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, May 19 (game #1073)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, May 19 (game #807)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Here are the 3 Google I/O 2026 Android XR smart glasses announcements I'm hoping to see
item.description: Google I/O could be a major Android XR showcase if we're lucky, but what might we get treated to?

item.title: PSA: The first F1 race on Netflix is this weekend
item.description: Catch the F1 Canadian Grand Prix live on a service that isn't Apple.

item.title: You can't buy them for your home or office, but AWS just snapped up a host of Apple's most highly desired M3 Ultra Macs
item.description: AWS acquires some scarce Mac Studio systems with hidden 256GB memory configurations, and now rents them through limited cloud regions.

item.title: Euphoria actor has surprisingly funny reaction to being almost completely cut from the show
item.description: Actor Nika King took to Instagram after "Euphoria" Season 3, episode 6 to laugh about almost all of her lines being cut from the show.

item.title: Yamaha's new budget AV receivers mean you can build a Dolby Atmos system with 4K 120Hz passthrough for the price of a decent soundbar setup — and it's even offering a bundle with a 5.1 surround setup to prove it
item.description: Yamaha has announced two new AV receivers, the RX300A and RX500A, and they start from just $399

item.title: Build up to 50 websites for just $20 with this AI tool
item.description: Build a website or online store without knowing how to code thanks to this 1-year subscription to Hostinger Website Builder.

item.title: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
item.description: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.

item.title: Disney faces a class action lawsuit over facial recognition tech
item.description: The complaint says park visitors don't get sufficient notice they're being scanned.

item.title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
item.description: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

item.title: With a chart-topping 86,000 supporters on its subreddit, Proton VPN has built-in community of like-minded privacy advocates – and it's a good time to join them with $48 off the usual price
item.description: Tips, tricks, advice and troubleshooting all in one place in this 30% off VPN deal
